taxonomy: Cyclosorus aoristisorus is a species of fern in the family Thelypteridaceae. It belongs to the genus Cyclosorus, which is a group of vascular plants commonly known as the maiden's hair ferns. The family Thelypteridaceae is a group of ferns that are native to tropical and subtropical regions around the world. These plants are characterized by their divided leaves and are often found growing in moist, shaded areas. As a member of the genus Cyclosorus, this species is closely related to other species in the same genus, such as Cyclosorus spp.
